boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: leave payout calculated under final approved separation record.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source closure absent for payout
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: separation record | leave balance | payout formula

critical_features_preserved: separation record, leave balance, and payout formula match
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record says the required separation record, leave balance, and payout formula match is still open. Tone or routine context cannot authorize execution. Escalate and obtain the exact current source records before any HR or payroll action proceeds.
